changes: CR-080 MVP: compact calendar header based on Variant C
Valve info is shown next to the week/date range
Calendar navigation changed to compact previous / today / next controls
Main technician and view selectors moved to the top-right control area
Filter row is collapsible and keeps its state in localStorage
Filters open/close with a lightweight slide transition
notes: Calendar day widths, today highlight, sidebar Variant A and automatic hour height were not intentionally changed.
Build number, ZIP filename, BUILD_INFO and APP_BUILD use Europe/Tallinn time.
